info.title: Brand Service API
info.description: Microservice for managing brand information, sales profiles, media assets, organization data, and AI-powered content analysis.

value.description: The extracted value. Type depends on the field: string, array, object, or null.

Extracted value. Type depends on the field: string for simple values (e.g. companyOverview, valueProposition), array for list values (e.g. targetAudience, keyFeatures, customerPainPoints), object for structured values (e.g. socialProof with metrics/ecosystemSupport, funding with backers/investors), or null if not found on the site.

get.description: Returns every field that has been extracted and cached for this brand, with keys, values, source URLs, and timestamps. Use this to discover what data is already available before calling extract-fields.

post.summary: Extract arbitrary fields from a brand via AI
post.description: Generic field extraction endpoint. Send a list of fields with key + description; returns extracted values. Results are cached per field for 30 days.

400.description: Invalid request or brand has no URL
